    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    O

    OFFICE_FEE - Variable in class classes.Application
    office processing fee charged for every application
    officer - Variable in class classes.Application
    The officer assigned to this application
    Officer - Class in classes
     
    Officer(int, String) - Constructor for class classes.Officer
     
    Officer(String) - Constructor for class classes.Officer
     
    officer_counter - Static variable in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    a counter to generate officers' Id number
    officerMenu(VisaOfficeSystem, Scanner) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Handles officer operations menu.
    officers - Variable in class classes.DataLoader
    List of officers in the system
    officers - Variable in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    In-memory list of all officers
    oop_project - module oop_project
